title: Pushing specific emails from outlook into activities board

posts.author: samredtiger (samredtiger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Does anyone know if there is a way to integrate specific emails from outlook onto the activities board?

Aim is to get sales team to track their pipeline correspondences. From other CRM tools I’ve used in the past, you setup a plugin on outlook side, then you can then track emails at an individual level.

From looking up Monday integrations it looks like it’s done in bulk/all emails are bought over, which isn’t what I’m looking for.

Any guidance/tips would be appreciated!

Thanks
